name: create_file
description:
Create a new plain-text file at the specified path within a registered source directory. Parent directories are created automatically. Supports text-based formats (md, txt, json, csv, rs, py, etc.). Paths may be absolute or relative to a source root.

Use this tool when:
- You need to create a brand-new text file at an arbitrary path within a source directory
- The file does not yet exist (or you explicitly set overwrite to true)

Do not use this tool for DOCX/XLSX/PPTX files. To create or replace Office documents, use generate_document instead. Also do not use it for PDF. Use generate_docx/generate_xlsx/ppt_generate to create, edit_document for simple Office text replace, or the doc-script-editor skill via run_shell for PDF and advanced Office edits.
For editing existing text files, use edit_file instead.
For notes in the notes/ subdirectory, use write_note instead.

path.description: Path to the file to create (absolute or relative to a source directory). Must be within a registered source directory.

content.description: The text content to write to the file.

overwrite.description: If true, overwrite the file if it already exists. Default: false.
